commands.command: vp run hello#build # should build the library

commands: ls packages/hello/dist # should have the library
vp run hello#build | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache

commands.command: vp run array-config#build # should build the library supports array config

commands: ls packages/array-config/dist # should have the library
vp run array-config#build | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache

commands.command: vp run default-config#build # should build the library supports default config

commands: ls packages/default-config/dist # should have the library
vp run default-config#build | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache
